services.ui_response: AI answered '2' correctly with GPT-5 mini model

request_headers_notable.X-Vqd-Hash-1: PRESENT (base64 encoded challenge response from previous status call)
request_headers_notable.User-Agent: Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) Chrome/146.0.0.0 Safari/537.36

events.description: Chat title assignment — bracket command, NOT JSON
Response start event — JSON with rs_ prefixed ID
Message content event #1 — JSON with msg_ prefixed ID, contains actual AI response text
Message content event #2 — same msg_ ID, likely continuation or completion marker
Stream terminator — bracket command, NOT JSON

wire_format_analysis.format_type: DuckDuckGo native SSE with bracket commands and JSON objects
wire_format_analysis.event_field: absent — all events use only 'data:' lines with no 'event:' field
wire_format_analysis.separator: Each SSE event separated by double newline (\n\n)
critical_findings: NOT Vercel AI SDK format (no 0:"text", d:{finish}, e:{} patterns)
Uses BRACKET COMMANDS for control: [CHAT_TITLE:...] and [DONE]
Uses JSON objects with 'id' field for data: rs_ prefix = response start, msg_ prefix = message content
x-vqd-hash-1 header is CRITICAL — present in both request and response, contains JS challenge code
Response body is NOT retained by Chrome HAR export for SSE streams — EventStream tab is the only source
EventStream Data column truncated in DevTools UI — full JSON not captured (need wider column or console extraction)

implications_for_apf_warning.previous_attempts_failed_because: Both Vercel AI SDK format (0:"text") and native JSON format ({role:assistant,message:...}) triggered ERR_INVALID_ACTION because DuckDuckGo client validates response 'actions' at SDK level
correct_format_must_include: Bracket command events: [CHAT_TITLE:...] may be optional
JSON object with rs_ prefixed id (response start marker)
JSON object(s) with msg_ prefixed id (actual message content)
x-vqd-hash-1 response header (currently MISSING from APF block responses)
next_steps: Need full JSON structure of rs_ and msg_ events (currently truncated)
Need to determine which JSON fields are required vs optional
APF must include x-vqd-hash-1 in response headers
Test with bracket command format instead of raw JSON
